message:
Add NTM integration E2E tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1lmx","title":"Implement snapshot service","description":"Goal:
- Implement snapshot service with caching/backoff and partial failure handling.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-n2t5 (partial failure + logs).
- Performance: bd-xiy5 (latency budget).

Definition of Done:
- Service returns snapshot even if some sources are unavailable.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:09.007157298Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:17:36.795969455Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:17:36.795568920Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["services","snapshot"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1lmx","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:27:08.190918780Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1lmx","depends_on_id":"bd-29in","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:57.056060942Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1lmx","depends_on_id":"bd-uipx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:09.028993413Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1m7s","title":"Tests for NTM driver + ingest service","description":"Goal:\n- Add unit tests + mocks for NTM driver and ingest service with detailed logging assertions.\n\nScope:\n- Validate state mapping, error handling, and backoff behavior.\n- Ensure log events include correlationId, session/pane identifiers, and NTM command context.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Unit tests validate state mapping and error handling.\n- Logging assertions confirm structured fields are emitted.","notes":"Implementation:
- Created apps/gateway/src/__tests__/ntm-ingest.service.test.ts with 36 tests
- Tests cover:
  - State mapping (mapNtmStateToLifecycle): all NTM states to lifecycle states
  - Health mapping (mapNtmHealthToLifecycle): unhealthy triggers FAILED
  - Warning states (rate_limited, context_low) don't change lifecycle
  - Config defaults documentation tests
  - State transition scenarios (startup, error, warning)
  - Type coverage for all NtmAgentState and NtmHealthStatus values
- All 36 tests pass","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:58.797304872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:45:51.227180426Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:45:51.227120664Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-1b9b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:46.730349085Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:08:38.683593654Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:58.817976113Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ml0","title":"Integrate ACFS checksum refresh into update-checker","description":"Goal:
- Integrate ACFS-style checksum refresh + verification into update-checker service.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-2u1u.

Definition of Done:
- Update checks verify assets against checksums before use.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:13.067784171Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T10:38:15.166905681Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T10:38:15.166862059Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["safety","updates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ml0","depends_on_id":"bd-2p3h","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:13.087804566Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ml0","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:27:00.025968861Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1p5i","title":"UX completeness audit for setup/install flow","description":"Goal:
- Validate end-to-end user journey through setup → detection → install → readiness → dashboard.

- Ensure UX flows exist for required tools and error states.

Definition of Done:
- UX checklist or E2E tests cover the flow.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:13.846959924Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:41.097444971Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1p5i","depends_on_id":"bd-2xku","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:41.097311269Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1p5i","depends_on_id":"bd-3oop","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:13.870082600Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3t9v","title":"Ingest NTM --robot-is-working for stuck detection","description":"Goal:
- Ingest NTM `--robot-is-working` to improve stuck/idle detection.

Scope:
- Use as additional signal for alerts (stuck agent, no progress).

Definition of Done:
- Alerting uses is-working signal and records reason in alert metadata.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:31.595096022Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:54.532243970Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:54.531849588Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alerts","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:50.227797696Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:31.738851612Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-2h6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:53.179283278Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3tog","title":"Gateway module map → integration coverage audit","description":"Goal:
- Map gateway modules to integration plan and identify unowned surfaces.

Scope:
- Routes, services, websocket channels, shared types, and web UI pages.
- Each missing surface gets a bead or explicit out-of-scope note.

Definition of Done:
- Module map exists and all gaps are tracked.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:02.330798080Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:27.811921659Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","completeness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3tog","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:23.744032803Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3tog","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:27.811814928Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3tog","depends_on_id":"bd-2p50","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:25.827084283Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3tog","depends_on_id":"bd-3oop","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:02.361201147Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-6huy","title":"Unit tests for ToolRegistry caching + error mapping","description":"Goal:
- Validate ToolRegistry cache behavior, TTL, and error mapping.

- Cache hit/miss and TTL expiry behavior.

- Structured log assertions include manifest path/hash/version and error category.

- Unit tests pass and failure logs are actionable.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:11:51.388388236Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T02:41:36.595630780Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","registry","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-6huy","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:11:51.482336848Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6huy","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:13:10.822649548Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6huy","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:13:19.467473779Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
